question: When the long-haired skateboarder passes a closed shop with a solid red awning on the street side: ① He performs action A. ② When he performs the same action A next time, what is on his right side?
Locate a skateboarder wearing a black top and black pants. ① When he performs a trick for the first time: ② The object closest to him on his right side is Object A. What is Object A?

After the long-haired skateboarder passes the first intersection: ① On his right-hand side, there are several shop signs whose main color matches his shoes. ② Among these shops, what is the name of the second one he encounters?

When the cameraman overtakes the long-haired skateboarder for the first time: ① The athlete points to a shop A. ② The shop diagonally across the intersection from Shop A is Shop B. ③ Since Shop B is on the corner, it has two faces; on one face, a white English letter is almost missing. What is this letter?

When the long-haired skateboarder has his left foot at the front of the skateboard for the first time: ① The main color of the shop on his right side is A. ② What is the name of the first shop he encounters on the right side of the road with main color A?

When the long-haired skateboarder gets off the board and walks for the first time: ① A couple (man and woman) walks towards the camera; the man's shirt and pants color combination is A. ② A lady had previously walked past the skateboarder's right side with a shirt and pants color combination exactly opposite to A. ③ What is the name of the shop closest to her when she passes the athlete?

The long-haired skateboarder can be seen passing a 7-Eleven and a Burger King. ① The 7-Eleven is in direction A relative to the Burger King. ② When the long-haired skateboarder performs his second trick: ③ Shop B is in direction A relative to the athlete. What is the main color of Shop B's storefront?

When the long-haired skateboarder is overtaken by two motorcycles: ① The color of the car he is facing is A. ② What is the color of the license plate of the first car with main color A that he passes?
When the long-haired skateboarder passes an NYPD car for the second time, what is the name of the shop to his front-right relative to his standing direction?
How many times does the skateboard flip in total during the journey from the first intersection to the second intersection?

① Find the road facility A in the intersection where the long-haired skateboarder performed multiple actions. ② Among the high-rise buildings visible in the diagonal direction of A, what is the color of the top of the tallest building?

The long-haired skateboarder is seen getting stuck on a stone pier at the second intersection, after which he steps down and stands the board up with one hand. If his initial skating direction was the 'nose' of the board, is he now holding the nose or the tail?
When the long-haired skateboarder passes through the intersection: ① How does he skate on the sidewalk?
answer_choice_1: Half the time with rear wheels raised

question: After the long-haired skateboarder takes a photo with the boy, there are some rectangular stone benches. How many benches satisfy these conditions: ① No one is sitting on them, AND ② The athlete did not jump onto them?
From the moment the long-haired skateboarder jumps over a relatively high flower bed until he takes a photo with a boy, how many times did he make a mistake?
At the end of the video: ① The long-haired skateboarder shakes hands with someone. ② The other person is holding an item A in their other hand. What is A?

In the video, the long-haired skateboarder stands the board up on its side for the first time. ① If the direction to the athlete's right hand is North: ② What was his skating direction when he first attempted a trick on the rectangular stone bench?

① If the orientation of the long-haired skateboarder when he first jumps onto the rectangular stone bench is North. ② What was his orientation on the stone bench during the attempt where he finally successfully completed the action without falling off the board?

The long-haired skateboarder enters the road from a crosswalk. ① He flies the rear of the board to the right and grazes a metal pillar. ② There are many metal pillars here, but spatially, only a portion of them allow the athlete to (i) exit from the same opening and (ii) safely graze the pillar. How many pillars satisfy these requirements?

When the long-haired skateboarder attempts to jump up a series of continuous sets of stairs: ① The first time he uses any form of board rotation to jump up the stairs, ② There is a wall on the side of the platform between that jump and the next set of stairs, covered with many repeated small graphics. What is this graphic?
When the long-haired skateboarder attempts to jump up a series of continuous sets of stairs, he uses a different action for each jump. What is the maximum number of times he used the same action?

When the long-haired skateboarder attempts to jump up a series of continuous sets of stairs: ① During one of the jumps, there is a brightly colored cone on the stair set. ② Beside the platform he reaches after this jump, there is a large poster featuring clothes embellished with many graphics A. ③ When the skateboarder encounters clothes/posters embellished with graphic A again later, ④ how many consecutive graphics identical to A are on the ground beneath his feet?

When the long-haired skateboarder attempts to jump up a series of continuous sets of stairs: ① He falls once, and falls in direction A. ② When the skateboarder skates towards direction A for the first time: ③ A lady walks past the camera. What is the color of her shoes?

Towards the end of the video, an H&M store is visible (①). ② In the first half of the video, when the long-haired skateboarder stands on a rectangular stone bench and holds the board vertically for a moment, in what direction is that H&M store relative to him?

Locate the parkour runner wearing a grey outfit who takes off his shirt at a certain moment. ① After taking off his shirt, they walk into a straight road. If their direction of movement at this time is North, ② then on the bridge at the very beginning of the video, what was their direction of movement closest to?

Locate the parkour runner in the white top and long pants. ① From the start of the recording until the first time he spins on a rail holding it with his hand: ② How many net turns to the left did he make in total?
Locate the parkour runner in the white top and long pants. ① Remember the first action he performs. ② Who performs this action the next time it appears?
answer_choice_2: White top long pants parkour runner

question: ① Locate a scene where only one parkour runner completes a high-difficulty move on a specific terrain, while another runner A is filming him with a phone. ② Then locate a moment where three parkour runners successively perform the same action. Which one in that sequence is A?
answer_choice_3: A is not among the three

question: Locate a moment (A) where three parkour runners successively perform the same action. Locate another moment (B) where two parkour runners perform the same action side-by-side for the first time. Which location is higher in elevation, A or B?

① Locate the first time two parkour runners perform the same action side-by-side; if their direction of movement is Due North. ② Locate the second time two parkour runners perform the same action side-by-side. What is their direction of movement closest to at this time?

Locate after the grey-clothed runner finishes his action along a low wall. ① All four of them hang on different bars successively. ② When dismounting the bars, they all do a flip. Remember each of their flip directions. ③ Immediately after, three of them do a flip again at a same location. Who flips in roughly the same direction as they did previously?
answer_choice_1: White top long pants parkour runner
answer: White top long pants parkour runner

question: ① Locate a parkour runner A who uses another runner to complete a backflip. ② Then locate the end where four runners jump down from a height sequentially. Which jumper is A?

Locate after the grey-clothed runner finishes his action along a low wall. ① All four of them hang on different bars successively. ② When dismounting the bars, they all do a flip. Whose flip direction is the same as the initial grey-clothed runner's?
answer_choice_1: White top long pants parkour runner
answer_choice_3: Shorts parkour runner and Yellow clothes parkour runner

question: ① Locate where four runners jump down from a height sequentially; one runner A is assisted down by others. ② Then locate a moment where three parkour runners successively perform the same action. Which one in that sequence is A?
answer_choice_3: A is not among the three

question: ① Locate an electronic screen displaying 10:10. If this screen faces North. ② Locate a man shaking a storage locker. What is the orientation of this man?

Locate a coach there who has a whistle in his mouth. What is the color of this coach's top?

① Locate the helmet logo outside the building, remember the helmet color A. ② The hat color of the first person encountered wearing a top of color A is B. ③ What is the color of the top of the first person encountered whose shoes are visible and are color B?
① Locate a person who satisfies: 1. Head is wrapped up. 2. Sitting against a cabinet. 3. The cabinet behind has many square grids. ② In what direction is the outdoor field relative to him?

① Locate the position A where the two mascots disappear from the drone's view the last time they are seen. ② Locate when the drone flies through a player's legs on the outdoor field. At the moment of passing through, in what direction is position A relative to this player?

① Locate the position A where the two mascots disappear from the drone's view the last time they are seen. ② Locate a person practicing football kicks on the outdoor field. In what direction is position A relative to this person?

Which one in this sequence of trash cans is of type A?

Locate the group of people running towards the indoor arena from outside at the beginning. ① If they run in the North direction, ② then what direction is the person playing drums under the stage high platform facing?

If ordered by height from low to high, what is the sequence of A, B, C?

In the corner of this poster, there is also a pattern with shape A. This poster's position is B. ③ Locate the group of ticket sellers wearing blue clothes indoors. In what direction is B relative to them?

① Locate a blue box in the middle of the road. ② When the car hits this box, colorful items spill out. ③ The last turning action the car made before hitting the box was A. ④ What is the first turning action the car makes after completing action A for the first time?

① Locate the opening direction of the box storing the drone. If this direction is North. ② Locate two girls in black standing in an open space next to a road. When the car comes to this location again, from which direction does it approach?

If this direction is North. Then in what direction is the blue box relative to House A?

① Locate a car with a drone on its roof appearing shortly after the start. ② Locate the moment the camera sees that drone for the second time. ③ Just before this moment, a number is visible on the wall. What is this number?

question: ① Locate a statue A at the entrance of the building. ② Locate a displayed miniature sailboat B. ③ In what direction is B relative to A?

question: ① Locate the drone encountering the mascot for the second time. If the mascot is facing Due East at this time. ② Locate the drone encountering the mascot for the third time. What direction is the mascot facing at this time?
